creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On aarch64, Linux golang test suite hangs at various moments, usually starting with the closure4.go test.  All of those hangs end up in binary in running state, with two threads.  In some cases it doesn't happen to the test case itself, but to the golang compiler.  I'm no longer observing the futex errors which were reported by the same test suite on same aarch64 machine before; my guess is there might be some kind of race condition in recently added aarch64 Linuxulator futex support?

On amd64 the problem doesn't seem to occur.
